title: Recommend future service
description: Customer declined: Front wheel bearings, both lower control arms, both upper control arms, front struts, alignment
Found transmission fluid level low; vehicle took 8-10 quarts to reach proper level
Adjusted transmission fluid level to specification; recommended transmission flush
Brakes, wheel bearing, and speed sensor replacement performed by other technician
Dealership later reported transmission failure; dealership confirmed our prior repairs and findings
Sensors located on back of valve head at firewall. Driver side easier than passenger side. Previous instructions incorrect.

title: Cradle Reinstallation - Order of Operations
description: Translation swapped. Cradle back in car. Guide pins fabricated for cradle alignment.
pain_points: Cradle alignment requires custom guide pins. Steering shaft alignment must happen before lowering.
tips: Tighten motor mounts to frame first, then lift and install cradle bolts. Align steering shaft before vehicle is down on cradle.

description: PATS immobilizer fault: key transmitter not detected by pickup coil. Ignition tumbler and key set recommended (includes 2 programmed keys). PATS reset will follow tumbler installation. Customer informed; awaiting authorization.

title: Inspect engine bay contamination
description: Remove engine cover and inspect light beige/off-white frothy substance covering hoses, wiring, and engine components. Identify material before proceeding with tune-up.
pain_points: Substance may be corrosive, biological, or chemically hazardous. Do not proceed with tune-up until contamination source is identified and cleaned.
